channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Still dumped toilet outside 21 brook drive., 24th June
item.description:
This toilet is still dumped here. The problem has not been resolved as per my previous report.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Infront of number 18 Athelstan, 24th June
item.description:
Drain blocked with moss which is making the floor flood when it rains, we need the moss cleared

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown entirely - stinging nettles, dangerous, 24th June
item.description:
This is the third report I've done in 2 months for this footpath. The stinging nettles either side are growing through at a ridiculous rate - they are extremely dangerous and the footpath is almost unusable now, particularly with children and prams. It is so unkept that there are dog messes there almost every day, because noone takes pride in it or look after it, despite it being used by multiple families every day. Something more permenant needs to be done to resolve this issue - cutting it back to the fence line is no longer sufficient as within a week they are overgrowing again - it's only a matter of time before they really injure someone in the eye or similar.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brownlow street, 24th June
item.description:
Light column completely detached. Hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brownlow Street, Holborn, Greater London

item.title: Contractors Barriers, 24th June
item.description:
The pavement and road repairs have been completed over a month ago The Barriers and cleaning of the remainder of the road has not been completed This has been over a month since completed Can we have the barriers and rubble on the road be collected and Swept up Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alpine Copse, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin Overflowing due to HMO occupants not separating correctly, 24th June

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Road, Woolwich

item.title: This has not been fixed, 24th June
item.description:
Please could you arrange for the pathways right along King Hall Road to be swept and cleaned as soon as possible. This work needs to be carried out by hand only, as the machine does not provide a satisfactory result. The area has not been properly cleaned for some time and now requires immediate attention. Could management also please review this, as it is becoming increasingly urgent. Many thanks,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signed knocked over, 24th June
item.description:
Post knocked over by HGV at 0840 24/06/2026 doing a 3 point turn.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup Hill, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal Chopping Down of Trees, 24th June
item.description:
St Olave's Church has been chopping down their trees next to their hall without any prior planning permission. Leaving the entrance to Woodberry Downs fully exposed to the noise and pollution of Seven Sisters Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
